title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入荷兰：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入荷蘭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage documentation against Netherlands (NEN/ACM/TenneT) requirements for EU CE framework compliance (LVD 2014/35/EU, EMC 2014/30/EU, RED 2014/53/EU, and Battery Regulation 2023/1542), transport, safety, grid interconnection via TenneT and DSOs (Liander, Stedin, Enexis), and destination-country due-diligence expectations, with Rotterdam as the main port of entry.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与荷兰（NEN/ACM/TenneT）基于欧盟CE框架（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、RED 2014/53/EU及欧盟电池法规2023/1542）、运输、安全、经TenneT及配电运营商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）并网和尽责管理要求的差距对照，鹿特丹为主要入境港。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與荷蘭（NEN/ACM/TenneT）基於歐盟CE框架（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、RED 2014/53/EU及歐盟電池法規2023/1542）、運輸、安全、經TenneT及配電運營商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）併網和盡責管理要求的差距對照，鹿特丹為主要入境港。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Netherlands (NEN/ACM/TenneT) requirements, EU CE directives, grid requirements, and destination-country requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、危险货物分类、海关裁定、并网审批或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行荷兰（NEN/ACM/TenneT）及欧盟相关法规的要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、危險貨物分類、海關裁定、併網核准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行荷蘭（NEN/ACM/TenneT）及歐盟相關法規的要求。

answer_first.en: For the Netherlands, the practical entry barriers are mainly EU CE conformity execution (LVD 2014/35/EU, EMC 2014/30/EU, RED 2014/53/EU where applicable, plus Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 lifecycle and due-diligence duties), TenneT/DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis) grid-interconnection documentation, and NEN/market-acceptance alignment overseen by ACM. EU membership makes this a harmonised-framework-first market, with 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase 50 Hz utility conditions, frequent expectation of Dutch-language documentation, and Rotterdam as the principal import gateway.
answer_first.zh: 对于荷兰，主要入门门槛是执行欧盟CE合规路径（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、必要时RED 2014/53/EU，以及欧盟电池法规2023/1542的生命周期与尽责管理义务）、TenneT/配电运营商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）并网文件要求，以及在ACM监管下与NEN及市场验收衔接。该市场以欧盟协调框架为主，电网名义电压为230 V单相/400 V三相、50 Hz，通常要求荷兰语文件，且鹿特丹是主要入境口岸。
answer_first.zht: 對於荷蘭，主要入門門檻是執行歐盟CE合規路徑（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、必要時RED 2014/53/EU，以及歐盟電池法規2023/1542之生命周期與盡責管理義務）、TenneT/配電運營商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）併網文件要求，以及在ACM監管下與NEN及市場驗收接軌。該市場以歐盟協調框架為主，電網名義電壓為230 V單相/400 V三相、50 Hz，通常要求荷蘭語文件，且鹿特丹為主要入境口岸。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
